raga: # Copy this to links.csv (gitignored) and add one row per clip. Only raga + url are required.
# raga       = true raaga (any spelling / diacritics; folded to the 40-raaga vocab; out-of-vocab rows are skipped by the eval)
# drone      = yes | no | unknown   (breaks accuracy down by drone presence)
# instrument = vocal | violin | veena | flute | nadaswaram | ...   (breaks accuracy down by instrument)
# start      = OPTIONAL start second to grab from (default 30
url: to skip intros); a &t= in the url is honored

raga: # --- example rows (delete; a leading # in the raga column marks a comment) ---
